violations.description: Demonstration of knowledge by person in charge. — --Person in charge did not demonstrate adequate knowledge of the food service code requirements. The dishwasher has been broken. The employee was only washing dishes in soap, and no sanitizer was being used. Manager has not corrected issue, or fixed the dishwasher to ensure that all dishes are sanitized according to code.

Duties of person in charge. — --Person in charge did not ensure employee compliance with an aspect of the food service operation specified in the food service code. The certified manager did not correct the ensure that the employees knew the proper procedure for cleaning and sanitizing dishes, utensils, and cookware.

General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Witnessed employee not washing hands after handling dirty dishes, washing dirty dishes, then handling clean dishes. Employee must wash hands before handling clean and sanitized dishes.

General employee practices. — --Food employee observed drinking/using open beverage container outside of designated area. Employee washing dishes had a drink on the shelf above the steam table that did not have a lid or straw.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Cloth used by employee with all purpose cleaner was not stored in sanitizer when he finished cleaning the prep table.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. The wood platform under the ice machine is bare wood and is not a cleanable surface.

General equipment and utensils - Use limitations of certain materials. — --Material of food contact equipment/utensil did not meet durability characteristics or are a limited use material. Foam bowls were being used to scoop sugar, flour, and other ingredients. These are not a durable material.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. The prep table was cleaned by an employee using only an all purpose cleaner. This surface was not sanitized after use with food products.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The ice chute on the soda dispenser needs to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The hood system over the cooking equipment needs to be cleaned.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during three compartment sink operation. No sanitizer was being used for washing dishes in the three compartment sink. Employee was only using soap and clear water. Employee did not know that sanitizer had to be used while washing dishes.--Equipment/utensil was not air-dried or allowed adequate draining after sanitizing. Employee doing dishes was towel drying dishes and not allowing them to air dry.--Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. Person washing dishes was using only soap in the middle compartment and rinsing in the first compartment. No sanitizer was being used
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. The dish machine was not working and not being maintained.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Plastic straw and cup lids were being stored on the floor in the bar area.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Foil to go pans on top of the microwave were not inverted.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. The hand sink for the kitchen did not have soap. The dispenser is not working and no other soap is available.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. The paper towel dispenser for the hand sink in the kitchen was empty.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc.) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling around the vent in the kitchen, walls above the hood system, floors under the cooking equipment need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc.) were not maintained in good repair. The floors in the kitchen have missing paint and exposed concrete. These are no longer a cleanable surface.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. The bulbs for the shop light in the kitchen are not shielded.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. The screen door for the kitchen has a large gap and missing weather stripping at the bottom. It also has a hole in the screen.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. The wood platform under the ice machine is bare wood. This is not a cleanable surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The ice chute on the soda dispenser needs to be cleaned..--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The hood system needs to be cleaned inside and outside.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. The sink was being used to sanitize dishes due to the dishwasher being broken. The sink did not test for the proper concentration of sanitizer. Employee stated he does not always use sanitizer due to it being tough on his hands--Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. The dishwasher was broken and the three compartment sink was being used. The sink was set up with soap in the middle sink and water in the third sink.

Handling of clean equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not handled in a manner to prevent contamination of food-contact surface. Employee doing dishes was drying dishes with a towel. These need to be air dried.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of foam and plastic cups were stored on the floor in the back storage room/office.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. The foil pans on top of the microwave were not inverted.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The wall above the small prep cooler beside the hood system needs to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. The floor in the kitchen has missing paint/sealant with exposed concrete. No longer a cleanable surface. Hole in the wall behind the back door.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. The shop light in the kitchen did not have protected light bulbs.
General premises. — --Window/door used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents. The back door was open, with the screen door being left open.
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Adequate, shielded, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
